params.prompt: Use the reference style but make a clearer tree-to-tree steering frame: one flying snake gliding through a rainforest gap toward a destination tree branch on the right, snake large enough for phone viewing, fully airborne and not touching anything, flattened ribbon-like body in a clean S wave, tree trunks at edges only, open negative space around snake, realistic natural history photograph, no wings, no legs, no extra snakes, no text, no logo, no watermark, no UI.
